category_sources: source_facts.description says it finds secrets and sensitive information; official GitHub README describes Nosey Parker as a CLI tool for finding secrets in textual data and Git history.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the display name Nosey Parker; source_facts.name is noseyparker.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains usage documentation and the repository includes an official docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; repo intentionally returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README identify CLI secret scanning across textual data and Git history.
